New top-level fork directories (Prague, Osaka) organize fixtures by fork

Nethermind targeting Wednesday; Besu needs 8037 review; Reth missing 8037 only

Teku similar to Prysm status; finalized payload storage work ongoing
Lodestar reviewing code for main branch merge

state_bloat.highlight: perf-devnet-3 deploying depth-based worst cases today; reaching 1.5-2TB state
Next stop 4TB; no more foreseeable worst-case scenarios after this
Slow block tracing PRs ready across clients; Nethermind reworking internal metrics

decisions.decision: Skip expensive Blob DevNet; test Fusaka features on Holesky/Sepolia instead
Use dedicated CPU instances for 1-2 days on bal-devnet-2 for benchmarking
EPBS DevNet 0: stable network without sync/malicious testing initially
Payload attestations will be ignored in EPBS DevNet 0; not breaking clients
State Actor tool runs parallel to BloatNet for different testing purposes
